summary: The implementation successfully addresses all seven requirements (REQ-9 through REQ-15) for adding syllabus chapter tracking functionality. The backend data model, association logic, frontend components, chapter selection in the timer, session history filtering, chapter statistics, and edit/delete operations are all implemented with proper validation, UI consistency, and stable storage support.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module (backend/migration.mo) for handling data migration from old to new schema
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not mention implementing a migration system or upgrading existing data structures. While this supports the constraint about stable storage, the explicit migration logic was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Notes field displayed in chapter cards with truncation
hallucinated_features.reason: While REQ-9 and REQ-15 mention optional notes fields in the data model and edit functionality, the BuildRequest does not specify displaying notes in the chapter list UI. The implementation shows notes display in ChapterManager.tsx.
REQ-14 requires chapter statistics with visual breakdown using charts, but the implementation adds gradient styling to chapter stat cards which goes beyond the basic visualization requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: Unassociated filter option in session history
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-13 requires filtering sessions by chapter and indicating unassociated sessions, but adding a specific 'Unassociated' filter option in the dropdown was not explicitly requested.
